problem: Sleep disorders are strongly linked to chronic pain conditions, yet sleep diagnostics remain complex, uncomfortable, and inaccessible for many patients, particularly children.
solution: Next-generation sleep diagnostics devices (Nox A1 PSG system for polysomnography, Nox T3s for home sleep testing) that simplify sleep studies while delivering precise measurements. Portable systems enable comfortable at-home and in-lab testing to diagnose sleep disorders that exacerbate chronic pain.
